articles.title: Biocon appoints Shreehas Tambe as CEO & MD effective from April 1 - Business Standard
articles.description: Biocon appoints Shreehas Tambe as CEO & MD effective from April 1  Business Standard

articles.title: Reframing the CAPF debate: Institutional design, coordination and internal security
articles.description: All internal security operations, whether involving CAPFs, intelligence agencies, or specialised units, ultimately intersect with the criminal justice system.

topStories.title: New COVID variant BA.3.2 spreads in US: Should you be worried?
topStories.description: Despite its “hyper-mutated” profile, there is no evidence so far that BA.3.2 is making people sicker.

topStories.title: US Ground Attack On Iran Soon? What Pentagon Pizza Meter Says
topStories.description: The highly unofficial, but usually accurate, Pentagon Pizza Index signals that the US military might be planning something big.

topStories.title: 'We're comfortable with India': Ex-Trump admin official questions Pak's mediation in Iran-US truce
topStories.description: The senior US official proposed that India should step in and Prime Minister Narendra Modi should give US President Donald Trump a call.

topStories.title: Iran emergency workers search for survivors after deadly US-Israel attacks
topStories.description: Latest victims include six people killed in Qom as Iran announces grim milestone of nearly 2,000 war dead.

topStories.title: Congress Debutant Vs Himanta Sarma Contest In His Stronghold Jalukbari
topStories.description: Jalukbari, one of Assam's most prestigious constituencies, has been under the stronghold of Himanta Biswa Sarma for nearly 25 years.

topStories.title: South Africa's exclusion from G7 summit no surprise, says Ramaphosa
topStories.description: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.

topStories.title: US Couple Saves $12,000 Annually By Living In Hotel Instead Of Renting
topStories.description: A US couple claimed they were saving $12,000 yearly by moving from a three-bedroom rental home to a one-bedroom hotel in Florida.

topStories.title: T.N. election 2026: When an ‘underdog’ MGR stunned many with his 1980 victory in Tamil Nadu
topStories.description: After President N. Sanjiva Reddy invoked Article 356 on a Sunday night in February 1980 to dismiss CMs in nine States, including Tamil Nadu’s M.G. Ramachandran, many in this State thought the victory of the Congress-DMK coalition in the Assembly poll was a given. Yet, it was the AIADMK that emerged victorious

topStories.title: Will petrol, diesel prices go down after excise duty cut by govt amid Iran war? Big question answered
topStories.description: The excise duty move comes amid disruptions in energy supplies globally due to the chokehold on key waterway Strait of Hormuz because of the US-Iran war.

topStories.title: Excise cuts won't change fuel price, relief only in narrative: Congress claims
topStories.description: Pawan Khera pointed out that these companies have been absorbing losses since the outbreak of the conflict in West Asia; "The government has now merely agreed to share a small part of that burden but reducing the 'special additional' levy - that too almost a month later," the Congress leader said.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Socrates: ‘The unexamined life is not worth living’
topStories.description: Socrates emphasised the importance of self-examination for a meaningful life. He encouraged critical thinking through dialogue and questioned societal norms, ultimately facing trial and death for his beliefs. His ideas remain relevant today, reminding us to reflect on our values and choices.

dailyNews.description: If the shutdown continues after this weekend, it will be longer than any previous shutdown, partial or full.

dailyNews.description: President Trump is poised to be the first sitting president to have his signature appear on the U.S. dollar.

dailyNews.description: Representative Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick of Florida is charged with stealing $5 million in FEMA money for her campaign.

dailyNews.title: What’s on Trump’s Mind During a Cabinet Meeting? Sharpies, Iran and Inflation.
dailyNews.description: President Trump waxed on about the virtues of the pen, calling it more economical and a better instrument than the fancier writing tools preferred by his predecessors.

dailyNews.title: Standoff With Iran Raises Fresh Doubts About Trump’s Freestyle Diplomacy
dailyNews.description: A jumble of emissaries — a friend, a family member, a dove and a hawk — on the Iran crisis reflects President Trump’s improvisational approach.

dailyNews.title: In Sleepy Town on Strait of Hormuz, War Rages Just Over Horizon
dailyNews.description: For centuries, an Omani exclave has been defined by a peculiar duality: rugged isolation and proximity to one of the world’s most important trade routes.

dailyNews.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s vaccine skepticism is posing challenges for the Trump administration. Top health jobs are unfilled, and a court has blocked his vaccine schedule changes.

dailyNews.title: Scientists Filmed a Whale Birth. The Surprise: Mom Had Many Helpers.
dailyNews.description: The episode, involving a group of sperm whales, adds to evidence that humans aren’t the only species that gets some form of assistance during and after delivery.

topStories.title: Trump says he will sign order to pay TSA workers following weeks of long lines
topStories.description: President Trump posted on Truth Social that he is signing an order to pay TSA workers. They have been working without pay for 41 days during the partial shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security. Roughly 11% of officers are calling out daily, leading to long TSA lines at airports. NBC News’ Tom Costello reports.

dailyNews.description: Dollar bills historically have been signed by the U.S. treasurer and treasury secretary.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon's Anthropic blacklisting for now
dailyNews.description: A federal judge in California has blocked the Trump administration from designating Anthropic as a supply chain risk to national security and cutting off the AI company’s work with federal agencies

dailyNews.title: Epstein survivors sue Trump administration and Google over release of private information
dailyNews.description: The class action suit seeks at least $1,000 per survivor from the DOJ and a court order for Google to immediately and permanently take down their personal info.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he will order DHS to 'immediately' pay TSA officers as partial shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: The announcement comes as the Senate has repeatedly failed to reach a deal to fund the Department of Homeland Security, which oversees the Transportation Security Administration.

dailyNews.title: Cruz says Trump's move to strike Iran 'most consequential decision' of his presidency
dailyNews.description: Sen. Ted Cruz says the U.S. is unquestionably winning the war with Iran and claims he advised Trump on Air Force One before the strikes were launched.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iranian protesters being ‘shot by snipers,’ voices support for people under regime
dailyNews.description: President tells "The Five" the Iranian regime uses snipers to suppress protests, drawing a distinction between Iran's leadership and its people amid Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises San Francisco mayor for 'trying very hard' to improve city after moderates took over leadership
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says San Francisco has tremendous potential and claims federal tools could solve the city's crime problems faster than local leadership can.

dailyNews.title: Senate approves most DHS funding, hours after Trump promised to restart TSA pay
dailyNews.description: The Senate agreed early Friday to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security in an effort to end a standoff in Congress that led to massive lines at many airports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll order DHS to start paying TSA officers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he will sign an executive order to restart pay for TSA officers, who have gone more than a month without a full paycheck.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's 2026 State of the Union Address and the Democratic response
dailyNews.description: President Trump delivers the longest State of the Union address in recent history, followed by the Democratic response from Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff floats Iran peace plan as Trump extends pause on energy plant strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump has extended a pause on striking Iranian energy infrastructure until April 6.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon from labeling Anthropic AI a "supply chain risk"
dailyNews.description: A judge has blocked the Trump administration from labeling Anthropic a supply chain risk and cutting off all federal work with the artificial intelligence firm, an early win for Anthropic in its bitter feud with the government.
